name: openoutreach_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the openoutreach capability.

prompts.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Find leads on LinkedIn for the following target market: {target_market_description} with these criteria: {search_criteria}
prompts.use_case: Sales and marketing teams seeking to automate LinkedIn lead generation.

prompts.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompts.template: Send the following message to each lead: {message_content}
prompts.use_case: Recruiters sourcing candidates from LinkedIn based on specific profiles.
